name: Automoto
description: Search Automoto publications, find people, and discover focus areas from GitHub Copilot Chat. Use @automoto to get started.

copilot_agent.inference_description: Helps discover Automoto publications, find people, explore focus areas, and learn about platform projects and labs. Supports slash commands: /paper, /researcher, /lab, /cite, /explain, /related, /trends, /compare, /rag, /help
